arts.ttl: Brentford ready to unleash forgotten man against Newcastle after quadruple injury boost
arts.sum: Thomas Frank could be boosted by the return of first team stars Rico Henry, Aaron Hickey, Gustavo Nunes and Michael Kayode for their upcoming clashes against Newcastle and Chelsea. Left-back Henry has suffered a catalogue of injuries, but played over an hour on his return against Plymouth Argyle in the FA Cup, before a three-minute cameo against Manchester City in the Premier League in January - his only top flight appearance of the season.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United given Liam Delap transfer update after 'internal talks held'
arts.sum: The Daily Mail claims the Magpies are among five Premier League clubs set to battle it out to sign the England Under-21 international in the summer transfer window. Pep Guardiola's side have a reported buy-back clause agreed as part of his move to Ipswich last summer, but the Reds have already held talks internally about a move for Delap, according the report.

arts.ttl: Team News: Newcastle United vs. Brentford injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Brentford.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's top-four Premier League rival dealt major injury blow - 'They don't look great' - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Brighton have suffered a major injury setback ahead of the Premier League run in with key men Georginio Rutter and Adam Webster potentially ruled out for the rest of the season. "So, both injuries [for Georginio and defender Adam Webster], I can say they don't look great," Hurzeler said at a press conference on Tuesday morning.

arts.ttl: What Fabian Schar development means for Newcastle United's summer transfer plans
arts.sum: Eddie Howe's pre-Brentford press conference on Tuesday morning brought with it some big news from inside the St James' Park dressing room. This time around, with the summer window fast approaching, it is Dean Huijsen of Bournemouth who continues to be linked with a move from south to north after a stellar breakout season in England's top flight.

arts.ttl: Jamie O'Hara shut down after 'embarrassing' Newcastle United trophy parade claim
arts.sum: "I know there will be a lot of haters looking at that Newcastle celebration, a lot of people saying, 'You've won the League Cup. Calm down,'" the former England number one told the Monday Night Football Club. Joe Hart has hit back at the 'haters' after hundreds of thousands of Geordies celebrated Newcastle United's Carabao Cup triumph in the city.

arts.ttl: Newcastle see Chelsea find another PSR loophole as Howe concerns remain true
arts.sum: Howe is not alone in questioning the current rules - and Chelsea's latest loophole again calls into question how such financial moves can be allowed at present. "I felt really uncomfortable in the summer when we were forced to make sales of two really talented young players in Elliot Anderson and Yankuba Minteh, against our will really for financial reasons," Howe told reporters in December.

arts.ttl: Premier League to finally use new offside technology THIS season as start date revealed
arts.sum: The Premier League will follow in both UEFA and FIFA's footsteps and use semi-automated offsides for the final part of the 2024-25 season, it's been confirmed

arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Newcastle v Brentford: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Liverpool deliver transfer stance on Newcastle target
arts.sum: Liverpool are expected to have a busy summer, and with a new central defender possibly being brought in, this threatens Jarell Quansah’s future at Anfield – especially as he has been linked with a move away in recent months. Quansah began the season as a starter, but Ibrahima Konate’s quickly moved ahead of him in […] The post Liverpool deliver transfer stance on Newcastle target appeared first on CaughtOffside.
